description: A user who lost their phone needs their multi-factor authentication (MFA) token reset so they can log in.

nodes.task_description: Receive the user's request for an MFA reset.
Verify the user's identity through a series of challenge questions or by video call with their manager.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully and securely verifies the user's identity before proceeding.

nodes.task_description: Reset the user's MFA token in the IAM system and guide them through enrolling their new device.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully resets the token and the user is able to log in again.
